What is the inflection point of f(x) = x: f( x) = x%3 - 3x%2 + 2 的反射点是什么 ?
f'(x) = 3x^2 - 6x, f''(x) = 6x - 6. Sett: f'(xx) = 3x%2 - 6x, f'(x) = 6x - 6. 设置 f''(x) = 0: 6x - 6 = 0, 所以 x = 1. 检查: f' 更改符号在 x = 1, 确认一个反射点。
What is the second derivative of f(x) =: F(x) = x * e__x的第二个衍生物是什么?
f'(x) = e^x + xe^x = e^x(x+1). f''(x) =: f'(x) = exx + xexxx = exx(x+1), f'(x) = ex(x+1) + exx = ex(x+2)
What is the 'second derivative' of a fun: 函数的“ 第二个衍生物”是什么?
